'''yajuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oarlop|oarlop]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oarlop|oarlop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yajuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæjikith|yæjikith]] || [[word:yæjikij|yæjikij]] || [[word:yæjikish|yæjikish]] || [[word:yæjiki|yæjiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajujukuth|yajujukuth]] || [[word:yajujukuj|yajujukuj]] || [[word:yajujukush|yajujukush]] || [[word:yajujuku|yajujuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajukuth|yajukuth]] || [[word:yajukuj|yajukuj]] || [[word:yajukush|yajukush]] || [[word:yajuku|yajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajufkuth|yajufkuth]] || [[word:yajufkuj|yajufkuj]] || [[word:yajufkush|yajufkush]] || [[word:yajufkuf|yajufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yajukuthu|yajukuthu]] || [[word:yajukuju|yajukuju]] || [[word:yajukushu|yajukushu]] || [[word:yajukuku|yajukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yajukuth|yajukuth]] || [[word:yajukuj|yajukuj]] || [[word:yajukush|yajukush]] || [[word:yajuku|yajuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yajukuthul|yajukuthul]] || [[word:yajukujul|yajukujul]] || [[word:yajukushul|yajukushul]] || [[word:yajukukul|yajukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yajukuthuthu|yajukuthuthu]] || [[word:yajukujuju|yajukujuju]] || [[word:yajukushushu|yajukushushu]] || [[word:yajukuku|yajukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yajukuthun|yajukuthun]] || [[word:yajukujun|yajukujun]] || [[word:yajukushun|yajukushun]] || [[word:yajukukun|yajukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yajukuthuoro|yajukuthuoro]] || [[word:yajukujuoro|yajukujuoro]] || [[word:yajukushuoro|yajukushuoro]] || [[word:yajukukuoro|yajukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
